name: GOLFTEC Omaha
about: GOLFTEC Omaha is a high-tech golf training facility focused on data-driven instruction and practice. Utilizing advanced motion measurement technology like OPTIMOTION, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, the facility provides objective feedback to help golfers improve their swing. Services include personalized golf lessons, custom club fittings, and practice sessions designed for accelerated improvement. The approach is analytical and systematic, catering to players of all skill levels who seek structured coaching and technological insights into their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven feedback using OPTIMOTION technology and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Personalized lesson plans and club fitting based on objective metrics like ball speed, launch angle, and spin rates
Access to practice bays with advanced technology for improving mechanics and consistency

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food services available.
No information on alcohol services available.

simulator_hardware.notes: SkyTrak is mentioned as a product provided by GOLFTEC, likely used in their fitting and lesson services

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, for lessons and practice sessions, you will need to bring your own golf clubs. GOLFTEC also offers club fitting services to help you find the perfect equipment if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food and beverage services, so it's best to assume outside food and drink are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC is a training and practice facility, not a simulator course designed for playing 18 holes. Sessions are focused on skill development and typically last for your booked lesson or practice time.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC is kid-friendly, offering junior golf programs and coaching designed for younger players to learn and improve their skills in a structured environment.
